headline: What's going on in today's session: S&P500 movers
summary: Join us in exploring the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Friday as we examine the latest happenings in today's session.

headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid CARR and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Carrier Global’s 22.3% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 15.1%, and its stock price has climbed to $67.75 per share. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
